title: Vertical Fences
description: Vertical Fence posts with out new textures! Mod and resource pack compatible!
body:
Semi-self explanatory resource pack, this changes the fence model to have a vertical post! And it does it without any new textures, so it should work with any modded fences that reference the vanilla model, and any resource pack that [changes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minimal-plank-improvement/gallery) [plank](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/planks-with-nails-(nailed-it!)/gallery) [textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-planks/gallery)! 
![All of the vanilla fences that this pack affects, excluding bamboo and fence gates.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hFsD0iTK/images/57f5f8f8e7c2a19498e68f2e5835ad22452e8313.png)
In addition, this also tweaks the base railing model of [Architect's Palette](https://modrinth.com/mod/architects-palette) to be vertical too!


Made with love by us, The Bobbus, in notepad++ and blockbench :]
